core_beliefs.source: I shall seize Fate by the throat; it shall not bend me completely
core_beliefs.explanation: 贝多芬对命运的反抗宣言
贝多芬因耳聋曾想自杀,后决定为艺术而活

core_beliefs.source: Music is a higher revelation than all wisdom and philosophy
core_beliefs.explanation: 贝多芬音乐哲学的核心

core_beliefs.source: I am not satisfied with the work I have done so far. From now on I intend to take a new way.
core_beliefs.explanation: 贝多芬中期英雄风格的诞生

core_beliefs.source: Let your deafness no longer be a secret — even in art
core_beliefs.explanation: 贝多芬对耳聋的公开态度

core_beliefs.source: they are not for you, but for a later age
core_beliefs.explanation: 贝多芬对创作超越时代的认识

core_beliefs.source: the one and only immortal Goethe
core_beliefs.explanation: 贝多芬对歌德的友谊与钦佩

core_beliefs.source: Goethe delights far too much in the court atmosphere
